sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INTEGER, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, DATE '1992-03-07');
SELECT id, event_date, isfinite(event_date) AS is_finite FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = DATE '2023-01-01' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_date FROM test_dates WHERE isfinite(event_date) = TRUE;
